signals.headline: South Korea's annual inflation rose to 2
signals.raw:
South Korea's annual inflation rose to 2.2% in March 2026, up from 2.0% in prior months but below 2.4% forecasts | NO | HIGH confidence**[1]

This March figure, released around early April 2026 per standard schedules, marks the latest confirmed data amid Middle East-driven oil volatility pushing prices above the Bank of Korea's 2% target.[1][4] The Bank of Korea held rates at 2.5% on April 10, 202
matched_markets: Will South Korea’s 2026 Annual Inflation be between 2.7% and 2.9%?

signals.raw:
Ethereum Foundation Completes 70,000 ETH Staking Commitment Worth $143M | YES | HIGH confidence**  
This recent confirmation by the Ethereum Foundation marks a reversal from prior sell pressure (contributing to ETH's drop from $4,000 to $1,800 earlier in 2026), shifting to staking that earns yields and supports price recovery to ~$2,250[7][7].

signals.headline: Switzerland secured qualification in November 2026 with a 1-1 draw vs
signals.raw: Switzerland secured qualification in November 2026 with a 1-1 draw vs. Kosovo (after prior wins like 4-1 vs. Sweden), avoiding playoffs and finishing top of Group B qualifiers (14 goals scored, 2 conceded).[1][2]

signals.headline: Their **Group B** draw—opponents Qatar (June 13), Bosnia (June 18), Canada—has been set and previewed in recent analyses
signals.raw: Their **Group B** draw—opponents Qatar (June 13), Bosnia (June 18), Canada—has been set and previewed in recent analyses, with no updates in today's news feeds.[2][4]
